prompts.prompt: Build a task management app where users can create, assign, and track tasks with statuses. Admins can manage all users.
Create an internal inventory management system with products, stock levels, and low-stock alerts for warehouse managers.
Design a simple blogging platform where authors can write posts and readers can comment. Include user registration and login.
Build a customer support ticket system with agents, customers, ticket priorities, and a dashboard for managers.
Create an employee leave request app where employees submit requests and managers approve or reject them.
Build a recipe sharing app with user profiles, recipe CRUD, ratings, and a search feature.
Design a project management tool with projects, milestones, team members, and role-based access for admins and contributors.
Create an event booking system where organizers create events and attendees register with email confirmation.
Build a fitness tracking app where users log workouts, set goals, and view progress charts on a dashboard.
Design a document approval workflow where employees upload documents and approvers review and sign off.
I need some kind of app, maybe for managing stuff? Not sure what features yet.
Build an app where guests have full admin access but admins can only view read-only pages.
Create a shop with Stripe checkout but no product catalog or order tables mentioned.
Build a user portal without login or authentication of any kind but with private user data pages.
Design a CRM with contacts and deals but the database should only have a single settings table.
Create an app where managers can delete orders but the orders entity is never defined.
Build a payment app with billing but payment endpoints should write to a nonexistent transactions table.
Make a social network with posts and friends but only define a users table with email field.
Build a task app where users create tasks with title, status, and priority. Admins manage users.
Build an app with admin, user, and superadmin roles but business rules only reference a phantom auditor role.
